nodes.name: 鹭科
nodes.summary: 鹭科（Ardeidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联57种鸟类，如白冠虎斑鷺、横纹虎鹭、船嘴鹭等57种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: White-backed night heron
nodes.summary: White-backed night heron（White-backed night heron，学名 Calherodius leuconotus），分类上属于鹈形目，并归入鹭科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于约翰·格奥尔格·瓦格勒、撒哈拉以南非洲，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 约翰·格奥尔格·瓦格勒
nodes.summary: 约翰·格奥尔格·瓦格勒是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括小嘴穴䳍、青藏沙鸻、鳳頭䴉等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
nodes.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、埃及雁、Western crested guinea fowl等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 鹈形目
nodes.summary: 鹈形目（Pelecaniformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联93种鸟类，如朱鹮、黑脸琵鹭、Plumbeous ibis等93种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-backed night heron (Calherodius leuconotus) is a species of medium-sized heron in the family Ardeidae, found in sub-Saharan Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-backed night heron (Calherodius leuconotus) is a species of medium-sized heron in the family Ardeidae, found in sub-Saharan Africa

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The white-backed night heron is located throughout central and southern Africa, with a range estimated at . Its primary habitat is dense forests with neighboring waterways, particularly streams, lakes, mangroves and marshes

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The population of the white-backed night heron is believed to be stable because it does not appear to undergo significant population declines or experience any notable threats. Due to these factors and its large range, the IUCN Red List has assessed the species to be of least concern. The species is currently experiencing a small number of threats, including habitat loss in southern Africa and hunting in Nigeria, where they are used for traditional medicine
